name: scheduler
description: Schedule a task to run in the future. Use this tool ONLY when the user requests a delayed, scheduled, or recurring action. Examples: reminders, notifications, periodic checks, monitoring, retries, daily/weekly routines, or any task that must happen at a specific time. Do NOT use for actions that should be executed immediately.

task.description: Clear description of what should be executed when the schedule triggers.

time.description: Execution time in 24-hour format (HH:mm:ss). If repeat=false, this is the exact execution time. If repeat=true, this value is interpreted as the recurring schedule interval or recurring execution time. Examples: '18:00:00', '00:20:00', '07:00:00'.

repeat.description: Whether the task should repeat. false = execute once. true = execute repeatedly. Examples: 'remind me in 20 minutes' => false. 'remind me every day at 07:00' => true.
